JOIN THE QUAILS' GATE FAMILY

As a third-generation, family-owned winery in the heart of the Okanagan, our success is a result of innovative spirit, community connection and the passion of our people. Steadfast in the pursuit of knowledge, our team has built a reputation for excellence by crafting consistent high-quality wines, tending to sustainably farmed vineyards and delivering an exceptional guest experience all in an engaging and supportive work environment. Regardless of where you are in your career, we offer comprehensive training and development to cultivate the potential of all of our employees. Explore our opportunities today and discover how joining our team can transform your career.

“Our people are the driving force behind our family’s brand values and success.” 
	
Tony Stewart
Proprietor
